players.name: SkXee_
players.experienceVerdict: low sample on this hero (outside the tracked pool)

notes: Their main damage was Sparrow (34k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

coaching.headline: A losing 8.5-min invade snowballed Sparrow and Serath, and the bad trades never stopped.
coaching.team: Three lanes were favored, but the game was lost early in your own jungle: the 8.5 loss (0-3) was a 5v5 your offlane never joined, which handed Sparrow and Serath a lead they never gave back, and the 11.7 Mini Prime fight (1-4) buried it. From there it was losing team fights — the 20.2 Fangtooth (1-3), the 26.6 Primal Fangtooth (2-4) — and bad trades deep in your jungle (13.7, 22.6, 29.6). Towers ended 2 to their 12, with only two of you building armor into Sparrow. The lesson: don't start the 8.5 fight a man short, and after the 11.7 wipe stop feeding the same carries on the same ground.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Losing the 8.5-min jungle invade (0-3) and the 11.7 Mini Prime fight (1-4) early, which fed Sparrow and Serath a lead that turned every later fight into a loss.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Phase died 8 times — four times your norm — starting with the 8.5 jungle loss and through every team wipe after. As the frontline support your reads set the fights, and these were almost all unwinnable from the start. When the team is collapsing in your own jungle at 8.5, the call is to back off, not commit.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Kira led the team in damage (30k) and got the bright spot — a clean 2-0 at their Mini Prime at 18.1. But 8 deaths came from being dragged into the lost fights (11.7, 20.2, 26.6). You were the favored carry; protect that by not being in the front of fights the team is already losing.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Greystone — only 3 deaths, the steadiest US line, and you won the 23.3 fight (4-2). You carried no magic resist into a 3-magical comp per the flag. Your discipline was right; the team needed more of it. Keep being the one who doesn't over-commit into their fed carries.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Gadget went 1/7 — 7 deaths into a game decided early. You were in the 11.7, 20.2 and 26.6 losses. As a ranged mid your damage should come from the back; getting caught that often means you were too far forward in fights the team couldn't win. Poke and reposition, don't trade bodies.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Khaimera was the favored jungle, but it started with the 8.5 loss in your own jungle (0-3) — a 5v5 your offlane never joined, so the team fought it a man short. That's the jungler's fight to read; 8 deaths followed across the team wipes. Next time that fight is going wrong, give up the camp and reset rather than feeding two enemy carries.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Narbash. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Serath. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Your engage/CC: Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Your kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
You have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where your heals out-grind them.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
ourKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
ourKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

ourKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
ourKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
ourKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

ourKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
ourKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
ourKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
ourKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Ascend dive → Heaven's Fury multi-strike → Chastise slow → Heresy form ult, resets on takedowns
enemyKits.winCondition: dive the backline and snowball Heresy resets
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline that creates her dive angle
enemyKits.playAgainst: peel the backline — deny the first kill and her resets dry up

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

enemyKits.combo: Thunk stun → March! speed → Song heal aura → Crash Bang Boom! AoE slow ult
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Thunk and group-buff the team through fights
enemyKits.playWith: a dive team that rides his speed and heal
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge/cleanse Thunk; he's low-damage — kill his carry through the aura

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

enemyKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
enemyKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
enemyKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
enemyKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam
